Engineering
that powers your growth.

At CloudMarc, quality is at the heart of everything we do. As industry leaders, we deliver exceptional Quality Engineering services and solutions powered by intelligence, automation, and a relentless focus on driving business success. Our ultimate measure of success is our ability to contribute to the success of our customers.

What  We  Do

Our Services

Staying competitive in today’s market requires a steadfast commitment to quality and continuous innovation. At CloudMarc, we excel in providing comprehensive Quality Engineering solutions, supported by our expertise in DevOps and Cloud Services. Our focus on automation, performance testing, and security ensures your technology not only meets but exceeds industry standards, while seamlessly integrating quality throughout the DevOps lifecycle.

How  It  Works

There’s always a way to do it better.
Start with the plan. Save on the stress.

CloudMarc strengthens the delivery of products, especially high-quality products. We’ll enhance the feedback response mechanism and implement advanced monitoring.

01

Eliminate defects,
errors and problems.

Streamline redundant processes ‘without a hitch’ with CloudMarc’s automation engineering services. Testing of systems is essential for solving issues in your development, business and customer service processes.

  • Reduce time + effort
  • Organise centralised systems
  • Increase customer satisfaction
02

Optimise software
performance.

Give your clients a great experience. CloudMarc’s performance engineering services ensures quality and stability during all integrations while significantly improving the experience and your bottom line.
  • Identify scalability issues
  • Highlight hardware constraints
  • Detect potential bottlenecks in software
03

Bring products to
market a lot faster.

Reduce cloud complexity and system maintenance with DevOps. Through faster access to development environments and streamlined development processes, your products are released faster and effectively.
  • Automate build processes
  • Automate deployment
  • Detect any defects early
04

Enhance protection,
minimise risks.

Strengthen your systems and safeguard your data with CloudMarc’s security services. Protecting your digital assets is crucial for maintaining trust and ensuring business continuity.
  • Mitigate vulnerabilities + threats
  • Implement robust security protocols
  • Safeguard customer data + privacy

Quality Driven Digital Transformation

Enhance
Performance

Maximise software efficiency and scalability through comprehensive performance testing and intelligent test automation. Our rigorous Quality Engineering processes ensure your digital environment is optimised for success.

Safeguard
Reputation

Maintain the highest standards of quality across every stage of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC). Our proactive monitoring and testing protect your systems from failure, securing your reputation and minimising risks.

Empower Teams
&Customers

Foster a culture of excellence with our reliable Quality Engineering solutions. We enhance both staff and customer experiences by ensuring seamless, trustworthy, and high-performing digital interactions.

Testimonials

Testimonials that speak to our results

CloudMarc strengthens the delivery of products, especially high-quality products. We’ll enhance the feedback response mechanism and implement advanced monitoring.

Robert Crocitti

Head of Product Engineering, Australia Post

"Quality, quality &quality! It’s been a pleasure to have CloudMarc on board in our development teams due to the absolutely quality individuals associated with the team. The team at CloudMarc have provided high calibre engineering consultants, who do fantastic high quality work and all have been high quality people; showing great integrity, responsiveness, initiative and attentiveness."

Jake Pedley

Chief Technology Officer, Health Recon Connect

"Working with CloudMarc has been a breeze. They took the time to understand our needs, and found the right consultants to support our growing technology business. CloudMarc’s consultants produced consistently excellent work and were able to integrate seamlessly into our engineering teams. Their insightful presence in our workplace continues to elevate the quality of our technology solutions."

Ben Cordeiro

CEO Utilities Software Services

"Key takeaways from my experience with CloudMarc include empathy, communication, outcome focus and cost awareness. Anyone can sell you resources, but quite often you’re just a quota and they move on to the next one in their pipeline. Yes, you need people to drive solutions, but business doesn’t stand still. So, you need a true partner that can empathise with your business context and go on the journey with you, solving problems along the way and continually optimising the best path to the right outcome, in the most cost-conscious way possible."

Will Erskine

General Manager PBT Group Australia

"We have been continually impressed by the quality of resources provided and the level of engagement by the management staff. CloudMarc are quick to respond, quick to provide great options and quick to mobilise people to meet our requirements."

Bob Houghton

ADICA - Head of Project Management Office

"What sets CloudMarc apart is their ability to provide skilled resources that bring real value to our organization. Their commitment to delivering exceptional service is unparalleled, and they have been instrumental in our delivery successes. I have no hesitation in recommending CloudMarc to any organization looking for offshore project resource solutions. I look forward to working with them in the future and have no doubt that they will continue to exceed our expectations."

Client CIO

CIO

"CloudMarc's impact was transformative. They initiated several parallel streams of activity that immediately improved our "Business as Usual" delivery and organisational test maturity. The introduction of test automation, in particular, was a game changer. It not only reduced our defect leakage into production but also significantly increased our test coverage and efficiency. What was arguably the biggest business impact, was the near elimination of human effort and error, leading to a material increase in customer trust."

Client

AI Director

"CloudMarc’s AI capability has genuinely elevated how we approach quality and delivery. Their ability to blend deep Quality Engineering expertise with practical, outcome focused AI solutions sets them apart. The accelerators they introduced reduced manual effort, improved test coverage, and gave our leadership team clearer, data driven insights. What impressed us most was that their AI solutions were not theoretical, they were embedded into our delivery model and created measurable impact within weeks. CloudMarc feels like a true strategic partner in our AI journey"

CloudMarc specialises in both. Whether you’re looking to uplift your testing capability, automate smarter, or explore AI-driven solutions, we’re here to support your journey.
